title: Four-Extremity Neurostimulation Using Two Cervical Octapolar Leads and High Frequency of 10 kHz
study_question: Can high-frequency, paresthesia-free cervical SCS provide pain relief in all four extremities?
population_assessed: 29-year-old man with C3 fracture, central cord lesion, bilateral upper/lower extremity neuropathic pain.
outcome_measures: Pain reduction (NRS), functionality improvement, opioid usage decrease
inclusion_criteria: 29-year-old man with C3 fracture, central cord lesion, bilateral upper/lower extremity neuropathic pain.
answer_to_study_question: Yes, high-frequency cervical SCS achieved profound pain control in all four extremities without paresthesias.
